nl_prompt: What is the revenue for the top-selling product?
generated_sql:
SELECT p.name, SUM(oi.line_total) AS total_revenue
FROM products p
JOIN order_items oi ON p.id = oi.product_id
GROUP BY p.name
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 1

nl_prompt: Which product categories have more than 10 percent return rate?
generated_sql: SELECT p.category FROM products p JOIN order_items oi ON p.id = oi.product_id JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.id LEFT JOIN returns r ON o.id = r.order_id WHERE r.return_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY p.category HAVING COUNT(r.return_date) / SUM(oi.quantity) > 0.1

nl_prompt: What is the revenue per customer segment?

FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id
GROUP BY c.segment

JOIN orders o ON s.id = o.sales_rep_id
GROUP BY s.rep_name
ORDER BY order_count DESC
LIMIT 1

       SUM(CASE WHEN o.status = 'Pending' THEN o.line_value ELSE 0 END) AS pending_revenue
FROM orders o

nl_prompt: Which customers with active CRM deals had delivery issues?
generated_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.name FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id
JOIN sf_opportunities so ON o.shipping_id = so.opp_id
WHERE o.status != 'Delivered' AND so.stage IN ('Prospecting', 'Qualification', 'Needs Analysis')

nl_prompt: What is the average deal size for customers whose deliveries were delayed?
generated_sql:
SELECT AVG(o.amount) AS average_deal_size
FROM sf_opportunities o
JOIN orders od ON o.opp_id = od.shipping_id
JOIN logistics_deliveries ld ON od.shipping_id = ld.tracking_id
WHERE ld.delivery_date > ld.expected_date

nl_prompt: Which of our top 10 revenue customers have an open CRM opportunity?
generated_sql:
SELECT c.name, SUM(o.line_value) AS total_revenue
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id
WHERE o.status = 'Open'
GROUP BY c.id, c.name
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10

nl_prompt: What is the delivery success rate for Enterprise segment customers?
generated_sql:
SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN d.delivery_date IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) / COUNT(d.tracking_id) * 100 AS delivery_success_rate
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id
JOIN logistics_deliveries d ON o.shipping_id = d.tracking_id
WHERE c.segment = 'Enterprise'

nl_prompt: Total revenue from customers whose CRM deals closed successfully?
generated_sql: SELECT SUM(o.line_value) AS total_revenue FROM orders o JOIN sf_opportunities so ON o.shipping_id = so.opp_id WHERE so.stage = 'Closed Won'

nl_prompt: Which customers have both high order value and a delayed shipment?
generated_sql: SELECT c.name FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id WHERE o.line_value > 1000 AND o.ship_date < o.order_date

nl_prompt: What is the on-time delivery rate by CRM deal stage?
generated_sql:
SELECT o.stage, COUNT(CASE WHEN ld.delivery_date <= ld.expected_date THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) / COUNT(ld.tracking_id) * 100 AS on_time_delivery_rate
FROM orders o
JOIN logistics_deliveries ld ON o.shipping_id = ld.shipping_ref
GROUP BY o.stage

nl_prompt: Which logistics carrier has the worst on-time rate for top revenue customers?
generated_sql:
SELECT l.carrier_name, AVG(CASE WHEN ld.delivery_date >= ld.expected_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS on_time_rate
FROM logistics_deliveries ld
JOIN orders o ON ld.tracking_id = o.shipping_id
JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id
WHERE c.segment = 'Enterprise' OR c.segment = 'Mid-Market'
GROUP BY l.carrier_name
ORDER BY on_time_rate DESC
LIMIT 1
error_message:

nl_prompt: Summarize delivery complaint themes for top 10 revenue customers.
generated_sql:
SELECT c.name, SUM(od.line_total) AS total_revenue, COUNT(r.id) AS complaint_count
FROM orders o
JOIN order_items od ON o.id = od.order_id
JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id
LEFT JOIN returns r ON o.id = r.order_id
WHERE o.status = 'Returned'
GROUP BY c.name
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10

nl_prompt: Which product categories have the most negative sentiment?
generated_sql:
SELECT p.category, COUNT(*) AS negative_sentiment_count
FROM products p
JOIN order_items oi ON p.id = oi.product_id
JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.id
WHERE o.status = 'Cancelled'
GROUP BY p.category
ORDER BY negative_sentiment_count DESC
LIMIT 1

nl_prompt: What common complaints appear for delayed shipments?
generated_sql: SELECT reason FROM returns WHERE order_id IN (SELECT id FROM orders WHERE status = 'Delayed')

nl_prompt: Find customers who mentioned competitors in support.
generated_sql: SELECT DISTINCT c.name FROM customers c INNER JOIN order_items oi ON c.id = oi.order_id INNER JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id WHERE p.category LIKE '%competitors%'

nl_prompt: What were top 3 reasons for returns?
generated_sql: SELECT reason, COUNT(*) AS return_count FROM returns GROUP BY reason ORDER BY return_count DESC LIMIT 3

nl_prompt: Which sales reps have customers with most positive feedback?
generated_sql: SELECT s.rep_name FROM sales_reps s JOIN orders o ON s.id = o.sales_rep_id JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id WHERE c.segment = 'Enterprise' GROUP BY s.rep_name ORDER BY SUM(o.line_value) DESC LIMIT 1

nl_prompt: Summarize key themes for Enterprise segment accounts.
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    c.segment AS Segment,
    COUNT(c.id) AS AccountCount,
    SUM(o.line_value) AS TotalSales,
    AVG(o.discount_pct) AS AverageDiscount,
    MAX(p.list_price) AS HighestListPrice,
    MIN(p.cost_price) AS LowestCostPrice
FROM 
    customers c
JOIN 
    orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id
JOIN 
    products p ON o.product_id = p.id
WHERE 
    c.segment = 'Enterprise'
GROUP BY 
    c.segment

nl_prompt: Which logistics partners have most damaged goods complaints?
generated_sql:
SELECT carrier_name, COUNT(*) AS complaint_count
FROM logistics_deliveries
WHERE status_code = 100 -- Assuming 100 is the code for damaged goods
GROUP BY carrier_name
ORDER BY complaint_count DESC
LIMIT 1

nl_prompt: What do churned customers say were top reasons for leaving?
generated_sql: SELECT r.reason FROM returns r INNER JOIN orders o ON r.order_id = o.id WHERE o.status = 'Cancelled'

nl_prompt: Find orders where complaints mention product defects.
generated_sql: SELECT o.id FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.id = oi.order_id JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id WHERE p.name LIKE '%defect%' AND o.status = 'Cancelled' OR o.status = 'Returned'
